candidates.why: This is the only operating D&A row explicitly tied to COGS, but it appears as a component beneath the selected parent row 'Cost of goods sold' alongside 'Procurement and Production' and 'Other Costs of sales', so it is already embedded in the selected COGS bucket and should not be added separately.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of goods sold'. The COGS D&A line is clearly a sub-component of that total, so adding it separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This operating D&A row is explicitly tied to SG&A, but it sits as a component under the selected parent row 'Sales, marketing and administrative costs' together with other SG&A sub-lines, so it appears already included in the selected XSGA bucket.

This operating D&A row is explicitly tied to R&D, but it appears as a component under the selected parent row 'Research and development costs'. Since 'Research and development costs' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, adding this row separately would risk distortion/double counting.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA reference bucket is the combination of 'Sales, marketing and administrative costs' and 'Research and development costs'. Both visible D&A rows are nested components of those selected totals, and the R&D D&A is additionally covered by the separate XRD handling, so no separate XSGA_DA row should be added.
